notes: Authored a 480 sqft studio: Vestibule 6x6 (36) + Bath 6x6 (36) + Kitchen 12x6 (72) along the top wet strip, with Sleeping/living 24x14 (336) below — total exactly 480 sqft. Initial validate failures were a bare YAML version (1.0 → "1.0") and overlapping connect percentages on Sleeping.top (split 25%/75% between vestibule door and kitchen opening). Final validate.mjs: success, valid=true, 1 floor, 4 rooms, 0 errors/warnings. design_critic.mjs: score 100, allClean=true, 0 findings across all 10 rules (entry_from_outside, reachability, corridor_width, door_opening, windowless_habitable, bedroom_bath_adjacency, wet_walls, bathroom_privacy, bedroom_size, overlap). Bath shares a wet wall with the kitchen (Bath.right = Kitchen.left) and is accessed from the vestibule rather than the sleeping area for privacy.
